prompt: kick on every beat, hi-hat on 16ths
basic rock beat: kick 1 and 3, snare 2 and 4, closed hat 8ths
code:
stack(
  s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~"),
  s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~"),
  s("hh*8").gain(.7)
).bank("RolandTR909")

prompt: four-on-the-floor house beat with offbeat open hats
code:
stack(

  s("~ cp").slow(2),
  s("~ oh").gain(.7)
).bank("RolandTR909")

prompt: tresillo: kick 3 over 8 with hats
amen-style breakbeat with degraded hats
code:

  s("bd ~ sd ~ bd bd sd ~"),
  s("hh*16").gain(.6).degradeBy(.2)
).cpm(160/4)

arpeggiated chord progression
polyrhythm: 3 against 4 with two percussion sounds

drum loop with reversed copy on the right channel
drum pattern that doubles up every 4th cycle
FM bell-like tones
minimal techno loop: kick, hat, bass, lead
code:
setcps(.55)
stack(
  s("bd*4"),
  s("~ oh").gain(.6),
  note("c2 c2 [eb2 c2] g1").s("sawtooth").lpf(800).lpq(8).gain(.7),
